Query
  Pipeline
    Stage extend
      Assign is_api
        Call if
          Call matches
            Ident path
            RawString "^/api/"
          String "yes"
          String "no"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
      By
        Ident is_api
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident is_api
